purpose: Track cross-publish URLs for layout.tsx ORGANIZATION_SCHEMA.sameAs and llms.txt enrichment.

cross_published.canonical_attribution: explicit blockquote at top + closing link

cross_published.owner_action_required: Generate API key at dev.to → Settings → Account → DEV API Keys, save to .env.local as DEVTO_API_KEY, then re-run cross-publish
Generate Personal Access Token at Hashnode → Settings → Developer, save to .env.local as HASHNODE_API_KEY, then re-run cross-publish

cross_published.canonical_attribution: explicit blockquote at top + closing link

next_steps: Add the 2 GitHub Discussions URLs to layout.tsx ORGANIZATION_SCHEMA.sameAs (or create a dedicated schema field for own-org backlinks)
Reference Discussion URLs in llms.txt under a 'Community discussions' section
Once dev.to + Hashnode API keys arrive, re-run cross-publish — total = 6 cross-publish URLs (2 posts × 3 platforms)
infrastructure_changes: Enabled GitHub Discussions on Yesol-Pilot/neo-genesis (was disabled prior to 2026-05-03)
